title: Colorful Texts
description: When white is too boring. Make all the text colored!
body:
Seeing all the texts in Minecraft being white can be boring. Which is why I've created a resource pack to solve this! Selecting a language in options changes the color of all the lang in the game, and the menu.

**There are 9 colors to choose from:**

- RED = English(Australia)
- GOLD = English(Canada)
- YELLOW = English(United Kingdom)
- GREEN = English(New Zealand)
- BLUE = Pirate Speak(The Seven Seas)
- PURPLE = ɥsᴉlƃuƎ (uʍop ǝpᴉsd∩)
- WHITE = English(United States)
- GRAY = Anglish (Oned Riches)
- BLACK = Shakespearean English (Kingdom of England)

**(NOTE: If you pick one of these, it will be writen in English(US), but colored.)**

**(ALSO NOTE: The "Font Settings..." is intentionally uncolored, for reference.)**
